note: Colombia production estimates from independent sources. USDA = USDA FAS PSD (Coffee: World Markets and Trade, Dec 2025); FNC = Federación Nacional de Cafeteros monthly bulletins (calendar-year basis); ICO = International Coffee Organization Coffee Market Report. USDA marketing year Oct-Sep; FNC reports calendar year. USDA column is auto-refreshed semi-annually from demand_stocks.json (build_balance_sheets workflow). FNC + ICO columns are curated by hand twice a year — add values after the operator runs the FNC scraper + reviews ICO's monthly report.
